topic: SEC-6.13 MOND grouping — c8 verification of ISS-2154 P1/P2/P3 arithmetic patches (TLDR five-of-eleven decoupled, remaining-six→seven, body range WIN-044–WIN-054→WIN-044–WIN-055)

holes_found.description: c7 H1 typographic inconsistency (curly quotes in back-reference clause) unaddressed. The ISS-2154 patches did not touch the self-own h3 paragraph 2 clause 'As established in the kernel above, WIN-054's ΛCDM Impossibility framing names this rhetorical structure directly.' (data/sections.json:p6-613-mond-grouping self-own h3 paragraph 2). Curly apostrophe (U+2019) and curly double-quotes (U+201C/U+201D) at positions ~13537-13559 remain adjacent to ASCII straight quotes in the same paragraph. Not introduced by ISS-2154 patches; not in scope for an arithmetic patch. Carry-forward from c7.
holes_found.recommendation: Optional 3-character normalization: U+2019 to ASCII apostrophe, U+201C/U+201D to ASCII double-quote in the one clause. Not blocking.

check1_terminology.notes: All three ISS-2154 patches verified present. P1: 'Five WINs from the late-March 2026 cohort' present, old 'Five of the eleven WINs added in late March 2026' absent. P2: 'The remaining seven belong to adjacent' present, 'The remaining six belong to adjacent' absent. P3: 'WINs added between WIN-044 and WIN-055 in the late-March 2026 commit cluster' present, 'eleven WINs added between WIN-044 and WIN-054 in three commits' absent. 'remaining six' count in section: 0. 'remaining seven' count: 1.

check2_seam_artifacts.notes: Grep for double-period, double-comma, orphan semicolon, double-space in section: all 0. No broken see-section/above/below cross-references. Seams at P1 TLDR end, P2 body end, and P3 body sentence all clean. The lone 'six' remaining in the section refers to 'six side-by-side discriminating tests on killshot.html' — unrelated to the MOND cohort count; not an orphan.

check3_patches_verified.notes: Patch file generated_at 2026-05-20T13:19:31Z > c7 reviewed_at 2026-05-20T07:40:14Z. Confirmed: (a) P1 proposed_text 'Five WINs from the late-March 2026 cohort ... Seven other WINs in the same cohort' present in data/sections.json TLDR. (b) P2 proposed_text 'The remaining seven belong to adjacent but distinct categories' present in body. (c) P3 proposed_text 'The WINs added between WIN-044 and WIN-055 in the late-March 2026 commit cluster (the body of which lands in three commits on the morning of 2026-03-23 at 04:57, 05:14, and 05:29 UTC — 32 minutes from first to last)' present in body. Note: patch file also contains ISS-2155 and ISS-2157 patches targeting data/wins.json:WIN-012 — those are out of scope for this SEC-6.13 verification.

unresolved_from_prior_cycles.description: Curly-quote typographic regression in self-own h3 paragraph 2 back-reference clause — see H1-carry-forward above.

check4_carry_forward.notes: c7 H2 context note (ISS-2153, parenthetical verbosity in closed-world h3 paragraph 5) is a c4/c5 origin item tracked via open-issues.json and was not in c7 holes_found; not a carry-forward responsibility for this cycle. c7 H3 (ISS-2137 OBE) confirmed closed per c7 review. ISS-2154 itself is now closed — patches verified landed.

check5_adversarial_scan.notes: Arithmetic: P1 TLDR 'Five WINs (WIN-047, 048, 052, 054, 055)' counts to 5. 'Seven other WINs in the same cohort (tidal constituents WIN-045/046/049/050/051 and dome-internal derivations WIN-044/053)' counts to 5+2=7. 5+7=12 consistent; no hardcoded total that could conflict. P2 body 'remaining seven': enumeration (WIN-045/046/049/050/051) + (WIN-044, WIN-053) = 5+2=7. P3 body 'Five are direct entries from the MOND community' follows immediately and is consistent with P1 TLDR Five WINs. No double-negatives in patched sentences. P3 hedging phrase 'the body of which lands in three commits' is conservative and does not overclaim about WIN-055's commit placement. No cross-reference breaks. Section bytes grew relative to c7 fingerprint (expected given P3 adds approximately +63 chars net); c7 fingerprint values no longer apply post-ISS-2154.

summary_for_decider: ISS-2154 P1/P2/P3 arithmetic patches verified clean. All three proposed_text strings confirmed present; all three old strings absent. Arithmetic now self-consistent: TLDR 'Five WINs... Seven other WINs' (5+7=12), body 'remaining seven' (5 tidal + 2 dome-internal = 7), body range decoupled to 'WIN-044 and WIN-055' with hard count removed. No seam artifacts. One carry-forward: c7 H1 curly-quote typographic regression in self-own h3 paragraph 2 back-reference clause — not in scope for arithmetic patch, still open as optional 3-char normalization. Recommended action: no_change. queue_id 393.
